intro.en: Peer-reviewed papers, preprints, and working papers. Citation counts refresh weekly from Google Scholar.
intro.zh: 同行评议论文、预印本与工作论文。引用量每周从 Google Scholar 自动更新。

intro.en: Funded research, collaborative systems, and open-source projects.
intro.zh: 科研资助、合作研究、系统研发与开源项目。

intro.en: Education, formal appointments, academic exchanges, and internships.
intro.zh: 教育背景、正式工作、学术交流与实习经历。

intro.en: Selected research awards, competition prizes, scholarships, and academic recognition.
intro.zh: 研究奖项、竞赛获奖、奖学金与学术荣誉。

intro.en: Invited talks, academic service, professional activities, volunteering, and public engagement.
intro.zh: 邀请报告、学术服务、专业活动、志愿服务与公众交流。

intro.en: Research milestones, recent updates, interviews, and media coverage.
intro.zh: 研究进展、近期动态、人物采访与媒体报道。
